courses.name: Bird Watching and Identification
courses.description: Learn to identify native and migratory bird species through observation and expert guidance.

courses.name: Wildlife Photography Essentials
courses.description: Master the techniques of capturing stunning wildlife photography in natural settings.

courses.name: Conservation Efforts for Endangered Species
courses.description: Discover how zoos contribute to protecting endangered species through breeding programs and habitat restoration.

courses.name: Animal Behavior and Ecology
courses.description: Study behavioral patterns and ecological relationships of diverse animal species.

courses.name: Zoo Garden and Plant Biodiversity
courses.description: Explore the botanical gardens and learn about plant species that support zoo habitats.

courses.name: Big Cats: Lions and Tigers
courses.description: In-depth study of feline species including behavior, physiology, and conservation status.

courses.name: Reptile Care and Handling
courses.description: Learn proper handling techniques and care requirements for reptiles and amphibians.

courses.name: Aquatic Life and Conservation
courses.description: Explore freshwater and marine ecosystems and their importance in global conservation.

courses.name: Primate Behavior and Cognition
courses.description: Investigate intelligence, social structures, and evolutionary connections of primates.

courses.name: Zoo Animal Nutrition Masterclass
courses.description: Comprehensive guide to dietary requirements and nutritional management of diverse animal species.

courses.name: Bird Migration Patterns
courses.description: Understanding seasonal migration routes, timing, and the threats migratory birds face.

courses.name: Veterinary Care Basics
courses.description: Introduction to veterinary science and medical care provided in zoological facilities.

courses.name: Habitat Restoration Techniques
courses.description: Learn methods to restore and maintain natural habitats both in and outside the zoo.

courses.name: Endangered Species Protection Programs
courses.description: Explore global initiatives to protect critically endangered species from extinction.

courses.name: Wildlife Conservation Strategies
courses.description: Comprehensive overview of conservation strategies and their implementation worldwide.

courses.name: Arctic Animals and Climate Change
courses.description: Study Arctic species and the impacts of climate change on polar ecosystems.

courses.name: Zoo Management and Operations
courses.description: Behind-the-scenes look at how zoos are managed, funded, and sustained.

courses.name: Wildlife Genetics and Evolution
courses.description: Explore genetic diversity, evolutionary biology, and selective breeding programs.

courses.name: Animal Enrichment and Welfare
courses.description: Discover how enrichment activities improve animal behavior and overall well-being.

courses.name: Global Ecosystems and Biodiversity
courses.description: Survey of Earth's major ecosystems and the incredible biodiversity they support.

activities.name: Meet and Greet with Zoo Animals
activities.description: Interactive meet and greet session with friendly zoo animals suitable for all ages.

activities.name: Guided Safari Tour
activities.description: Led tour through the zoo exploring major animal habitats and learning about species.

activities.name: Nature Walk and Bird Spotting
activities.description: Peaceful walk through natural areas of the zoo focusing on bird identification.

activities.name: Educational Talk on Wildlife
activities.description: Expert-led presentation on wildlife facts and zoo conservation missions.

activities.name: Children's Zoo Camp Activities
activities.description: Fun and educational activities designed specifically for children ages 5-12.

activities.name: Big Cat Feeding Experience
activities.description: Observe and learn about feeding behaviors of lions, tigers, and other large felines.

activities.name: Guided Aquarium Tour
activities.description: In-depth exploration of aquatic ecosystems and marine species conservation.

activities.name: Reptile Handling Show
activities.description: Educational demonstration featuring live reptile handling and fascinating facts.

activities.name: Primate Observation Session
activities.description: Guided observation of primate behavior and social interactions in their habitat.

activities.name: Junior Zookeeper Program
activities.description: Interactive program where children can learn zookeeper duties and care techniques.

activities.name: Photography Walk with Guide
activities.description: Early morning guided walk optimized for wildlife photography enthusiasts.

activities.name: Evening Wildlife Hunt
activities.description: Evening tour observing nocturnal animal activities and twilight behaviors.

activities.name: Educational Wildlife Workshop
activities.description: Interactive workshop covering wildlife facts, conservation, and ecology.

activities.name: Animal Care Demonstration
activities.description: Watch zookeepers demonstrate daily care and feeding routines for various animals.

activities.name: Nature Sketching Class
activities.description: Artistic class combining nature observation with sketching and drawing techniques.

activities.name: Arctic Animals Talk and Presentation
activities.description: Fascinating presentation about polar species and Arctic ecosystem conservation.

activities.name: Indoor Aquatic Center Tour
activities.description: Guided tour of indoor aquatic facilities and climate-controlled habitats.

activities.name: Holiday Lights and Zoo Tour
activities.description: Evening tour celebrating seasonal decorations and festive zoo atmosphere.

activities.name: Animal Wellness and Health Talk
activities.description: Educational session on how zoos ensure animal health, nutrition, and well-being.

activities.name: Conservation Documentary Film Screening
activities.description: Screening of award-winning conservation and wildlife documentary films.
